more.title: South Africa ramps up border security with traceable passport stamps
more.description: IOL South Africa Border Management Authority (BMA) Commissioner Dr Michael Masiapato says the agency has introduced highly secure new passport stamps with unique numbers allocated to specific immigration officers, which will allow authorities to trace any illegally stamped passport back to the responsible official.
